headline: Johan Manzambi
body: 🚨🟣🔵 Understand Aston Villa are among clubs attentive to Johan Manzambi situation with Newcastle. Newcastle agreed terms with Freiburg but waiting on player’s green light to proceed. AVFC interested and attentive; it’s up to the player. 🎥 piped.video/Qw-LiWpyCmU
raw_text:
🚨🟣🔵 Understand Aston Villa are among clubs attentive to Johan Manzambi situation with Newcastle.

Newcastle agreed terms with Freiburg but waiting on player’s green light to proceed.

#AVFC interested and attentive; it’s up to the player.

🎥 piped.video/Qw-LiWpyCmU
